JobMetadata.description: Operational provenance for a single scored job: which run, model, prompt, and profile produced this record.
JobMetadata.title: JobMetadata

SkillsFitAnalysis.description: Structured LLM analysis of how well a job posting matches the candidate profile.

fit_score.description: 1 = reject; 2 = weak fit; 3 = possible fit; 4 = good fit; 5 = strong fit.
fit_score.title: Fit Score

confidence.description: How confident the model is that the JD contains enough information to judge fit.
confidence.title: Confidence

score_rationale.description: Concise evidence-based explanation of the score.
score_rationale.title: Score Rationale

top_matches.description: 2-5 specific overlaps between the posting and the candidate profile.
top_matches.title: Top Matches

gaps.description: 2-5 missing requirements, weak matches, or role misalignments.
gaps.title: Gaps

hard_concerns.description: Hard blockers: clearance, location, credential, seniority, salary, work authorization.
hard_concerns.title: Hard Concerns

core_job_duties.description: The 4-5 most important job duties, ideally quoted verbatim from the JD.
core_job_duties.title: Core Job Duties

SkillsFitAnalysis.title: SkillsFitAnalysis

title: ScoredJobPosting
description: A scraped job posting enriched with remote-filter classification and AI skills-fit analysis.

dedup_hash.description: Deterministic SHA-256 hash used for deduplication across batches.
dedup_hash.title: Dedup Hash

source_url.description: Canonical URL to the original job posting.
source_url.title: Source Url

title.description: Job title as listed by the employer.
title.title: Title

description.description: Full raw text body of the job description.
description.title: Description

scraped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this posting was ingested.
scraped_at.title: Scraped At

remote_classification.description: Remote-work classification produced by the remote-filter agent.
remote_classification.title: Remote Classification

pipeline_metadata.description: JSONB blob of pipeline-internal keys: prefilter, remote-filter, scrub counts, search params.
pipeline_metadata.title: Pipeline Metadata

ai_fit.description: Skills-fit analysis produced by the LLM agent. Null when scoring failed or was skipped.

metadata.description: Operational provenance: run ID, model, prompt hash, profile hash, timestamps.
